message:
test(mux): concurrent stress tests for EventBus (wa-3dfxb.13)

Adds 5 multi-threaded stress tests for EventBus concurrent correctness:
- concurrent_fire_from_multiple_threads: 8 threads × 1000 fires
- concurrent_register_and_fire: 4 registrars + 4 firers
- concurrent_register_deregister: 4 threads register/deregister cycles
- concurrent_multi_event_type_dispatch: 3 producers (status/output/resize)
- sustained_high_throughput: 10K events with 3 handlers

All tests verify no panics, no lost events, and consistent handler counts
under contention. EventBus now has 36 tests total (15 unit + 16 proptest +
5 concurrent).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
